title: Ph.D. in Mechanical Engineering
institution: Indian Institute of Technology Guwahati (IIT Guwahati)
description: Conducted extensive research in the field of Manufacturing Engineering, focusing on solid-state joining technologies, especially Friction Stir Welding (FSW) of lightweight alloys.
Contributed significantly to the understanding and improvement of FSW processes for enhancing weld qualities of magnesium and aluminium alloys.

thesis.title: Enhancement of Weld Qualities in Friction Stir Welding
thesis.supervisor: Dr. Sukhomay Pal, Professor, IIT Guwahati
thesis.description: Investigated the effects of various process parameters and tool geometries on mechanical properties and microstructural characteristics of friction stir welded joints. Work involved extensive experimentation, optimization techniques, and metallurgical characterization.
